SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (31111279.pdf)
SUMMARY: Highly motivated and driven Manager of the Project Management Office (PMO). Currently seeking opportunities to help organizations realize benefits of formal PMO methodology. Passionate about PMO engagement in health care.
SKILLS: Project Management, IT Systems Management, Budget Management, Training and Development, Software Tools Implementation, Database Maintenance, System Upgrades

SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
JOB TITLE: Manager, Information Technology Project Management Office
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 06/2008 - Current
DESCRIPTION: Manage portfolio of all PMO projects related to Corporate Services and Infrastructure. Manage two teams of project managers with specialty field skills.

SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
JOB TITLE: Project Manager / Application Systems Analyst III
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 06/2004 - 06/2008
DESCRIPTION: Manage multiple new IT systems with budgets ranging from $500k to $4M. Lead team for PMO training and implementation of various software tools.

SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
JOB TITLE: Systems Analyst II/ Product Manager - Vantive (PeopleSoft tool)
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 05/2001 - 06/2004
DESCRIPTION: Support nationwide call center environments. Manage system upgrades and software maintenance.

SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
JOB TITLE: Systems Analyst II/ Project Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 04/2000 - 05/2001
DESCRIPTION: Project management for Patient Accounting and clinical upgrades. Support existing modules and maintain MUMPS database.

SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
JOB TITLE: Project Manager Intermediate / Software Analyst II
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 12/1998 - 04/2000
DESCRIPTION: Financial analyst on McKesson HBOC Star Financials. Perform upgrade to new GUI platform.

SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
JOB TITLE: Systems Analyst/ Programmer
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 05/1998 - 12/1998
DESCRIPTION: Program in SQL for clinical and financial systems. Project manager on IMNET Electronic Medical Records software.

SOURCE: 31111279.pdf
DEGREE: B.A: Foreign Languages and Literatures
